name: repo-knowledge-compiler
description: Maintain a repository knowledge base and compile it into agent instructions, review guidance, and path-scoped rules.

interface.shortDescription: Compile repo knowledge into agent instructions
interface.longDescription: A skill and lightweight CLI for adapting the LLM Wiki pattern to development repositories. It maintains .repo-kb as persistent Markdown knowledge and compiles it into CLAUDE.md, REVIEW.md, and path-scoped rules.
defaultPrompt: Use $repo-kb to ingest this review note.
